title: lycopodium complanatum f. wibbei
intro: Lycopodium complanatum f. wibbei, also known as Stag's Horn or Wibbei's Club Moss, is a rare and endangered species of club moss that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which may aid in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Lycopodium complanatum f. wibbei are thought to include the alleviation of symptoms associated with colds and flu, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In herbal preparations, Lycopodium complanatum f. wibbei is often combined with other herbs to create tonics, infusions, and salves that can be used to support respiratory health and well-being.
